object_definition: FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (updated_by) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
CREATE INDEX admin_users_level_status_idx ON public.admin_users USING btree (admin_level, status)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX admin_users_pkey ON public.admin_users USING btree (user_id)
